description: Deny-by-default capability policy for Ghoti operator recipes. Mirrors rust/ghoti_policy_checker. Any capability not in allowed_capabilities is denied. Recipes may inspect, summarize, validate, and write repo-local generated reports only.

rust_enforcement.status: invoked by ghoti_operator_recipes.py when a built binary is present; Python mirror enforces the same deny-by-default policy when the binary is absent
